tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork14 (Origami Tessellation)
tags.description: Adapted from the scrolling origami tile sketch. Tiles are generated once per tile-size change and scroll downward continuously. Each tile independently lerps its fold amount toward a random target, creating staggered fold animation. Four fold types: valley (left/right split), mountain (peak highlight), waterbomb (4 radial triangles with centre-point), twist (rotated inner square). Hue offset per tile gives variation within the palette.
